title: Anaun
summary: Anaun (Russian: Анаун) is a stratovolcano in central Kamchatka. The volcano is located to the north-east of Uksichan volcano in the southern Sredinny Range.
text: Anaun (Russian: Анаун) is a stratovolcano in central Kamchatka. The volcano is located to the north-east of Uksichan volcano in the southern Sredinny Range.
